Feedback

It is ok to leave some fields unfilled if you have nothing new to share. You can come back to this page and complete the feedback form any time later. You can still edit your answers after submitting. You can find all your finished games in your user profile.

What did you think of the new alien species? Did you find anything confusing?

How would you rate them on a scale from 1 to 10? Do you have a favorite species? A least favorite?

There are 11 different companies in the playtest right now. Did you enjoy playing with them? Do you feel there’s enough variety between them all?

The game is 4 rounds long now. Does this feel too short to you? Too long? Just right?

The bonus cards you select at the start of the game alongside your company are designed to facilitate a shorter game by simulating round 1. Did you like the bonus cards?

Did you play with the new signal tokens this game? What did you think of them?

What did you think of the alphabet alien species? Were they fun? Did you find anything confusing?

What did you think of the spaceship alien species? Were they fun? Did you find anything confusing?

Are there any new cards you would like to talk about?

In 2-player games, a neutral organization begins the game by playing 4 bonus cards. What are your thoughts on this? Did you like how it changed the initial configuration of the game?

What did you think of the amoeba alien species? Were they fun? Did you find anything confusing?

Is there anything else you would like to mention?
